creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Rees from comment #2)
> Would it be a problem if I just changed this?

Yes.  Please don't.

Release notes for 11.x and prior are immutable after the final release build.  And, 10.3 is no longer supported anyway.  (I actually thought I closed this PR based on the latter point a few weeks ago.)
